Gresham's Google Training

📅 March 16, 2016


Click here to enter feedback and/or ask questions as we go along.

Navigating around - the 'Google Waffle'

E-mail
  • labels vs folders
  • labs
  • forwarding
  • labs
  • themes
  • signatures
Calendar
  • making a calendar public
  • using IFTTT to set up alerts from calendar alterations
  • inviting people to meetings
  • appointment slots
Drive
  • uploading and converting
  • copying, sharing
  • putting something in two places at once (SHIFT+Z)
  • searching
Docs
  • sharing
  • revision history
  • voice typing
  • research
Sheets
  • sharing, protecting
  • mail merges and other addons
Google Forms
  • e.g. minibus bookings
  • Google apps script - an example of a duty rota
  • Creating and sharing a form
Slides
  • sharing etc.
Sites
  • OsNet
  • Apps Script (e.g. message board)
  • Make your own..
Other stuff

  • Back end stuff
  • Google Keep
  • Google Circles
